definitions.text: The OpenAssistant Conversations Dataset, a human-generated and annotated dataset used for instruction tuning to improve a model's ability to follow user queries.

relationships.evidence: OASST1 is a human-generated, human-annotated, assistant-style conversation, created through global crowdsourcing and widely used for human alignment tasks (K¨opf et al., 2023; Dettmers et al., 2023; Wu et al., 2024b).
